basic_details.job_title: BITS Pilani Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Senior Instructor, Instructor Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Birla Institute of Technology and Science Pilani (BITS Pilani)
basic_details.short_information: Birla Institute of Technology and Science Pilani (BITS Pilani) Senior Instructor & Instructor (Off-Campus) Notification 2026 has been released on Not Mentioned on the official website bits-pilani.ac.in. A total of 8 vacancies have been announced through the BITS Pilani Senior Instructor & Instructor (Off-Campus) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: Senior Instructor: M. Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (CSE), Information Technology (IT), Data Science and Engineering (DSE), Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning (AIML), or a closely related discipline. Instructor: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (CSE), Information Technology (IT), or a closely related discipline. Selected candidates expected to enroll in and complete a relevant M. Tech. programme, as per institutional requirements.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 8.84 Lakhs - Rs. 12 Lakhs Per Annum

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BITS Pilani to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for BITS Pilani Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the BITS Pilani Senior Instructor & Instructor posts is 15th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for BITS Pilani Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 8 vacancies for the posts of Senior Instructor and Instructor (Off-Campus) at BITS Pilani.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Instructor post?
faq.answer: For the Instructor post, candidates need a B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (CSE), Information Technology (IT), or a closely related discipline. Selected candidates are expected to enroll in and complete a relevant M. Tech. programme.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary offered for both Senior Instructor and Instructor positions ranges from Rs. 8.84 Lakhs to Rs. 12 Lakhs Per Annum.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for BITS Pilani Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for BITS Pilani Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply online through the official BITS Pilani website.

faq.question: Q7. Which departments are covered under the qualification criteria?
faq.answer: The qualification criteria cover disciplines such as Computer Science and Engineering (CSE), Information Technology (IT), Data Science and Engineering (DSE), and Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning (AIML).

faq.question: Q8. Does BITS Pilani offer age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Information regarding age relaxation is not explicitly detailed in the provided summary. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for specific details.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these positions is Full Time.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification and the online application link can be found in the "Important Links" section of this article.
